headline: The Coming 2026 Growth Surge (& How to Ride it)
summary: It's no coincidence that the top five wealthiest people on Earth are products of the high-growth tech sector. 2026 will provide investors with one of the best opportunities to buy tech stocks in history.

headline: Coca-Cola Slips Below 50-Day SMA: Buy Opportunity or Wait for Now?
summary: KO falls below its 50-day SMA amid macroeconomic headwinds and estimate cuts, but trading above the 200-day average keeps the long-term uptrend intact.

headline: nFuse raises funding to allow retailers to place orders through messaging platforms
summary: Its platform allows retailers and hospitality operators to place orders through WhatsApp, Viber and SMS using text, voice or images.
